channel.title: La Cyber Sphère — Bulletin de veille cyber
channel.description: Alertes critiques et élevées, résumées et sourcées.

item.title: [Faible] RedHook Android malware now uses Wireless ADB for shell access
item.description: A new version of the RedHook Android malware abuses the Android Wireless Debugging (Wireless ADB) mechanism in a novel way to gain shell-level privileges without requiring a computer connection. [...]

item.title: [Élevé] Compromised jscrambler 8.14.0 npm Release Drops Rust Infostealer During Install
item.description: The jscrambler npm package was compromised, and simply installing its 8.14.0 release runs an infostealer on your machine. Published on July 11, 2026, the malicious version carries a preinstall hook…

item.title: [Critique] Hackers Weaponize Balochistan Police Portal in Multi-Group Espionage Campaigns
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of sustained cyber espionage activity against several Pakistani law enforcement organizations undertaken by suspected China- and India-aligned threat actors between…
